summary: The palatine processes typically begin fusing near the end of the eighth gestational week; thus, selecting an answer closely aligned within this window—such as "six weeks post-fertilization" from your options—is reasonable based on common developmental benchmarks for these anatomical regions during early fetal life. \(\blacksquare\)
